.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(207, 230, 190) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #e0f8cf 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#e0f8cf, color-mix(in srgb, #e0f8cf 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #e0f8cf 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#e0f8cf, color-mix(in srgb, #e0f8cf 65%, transparent))
body.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")
body.background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

html.--xfa-unfocused-field-background: url("data:image/svg+xmlcharset=UTF-8,<svg width='1px' height='1px' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='100%' height='100%' style='fill:rgba(0, 54, 255, 0.13)'/></svg>")

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(8, 185, 78) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(224, 248, 207) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(207, 230, 190) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(8, 185, 78) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(207, 230, 190) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(207, 230, 190) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
